---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ILX AI CLI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature you would like to see.

## Problem it solves

Describe the problem or friction this feature would eliminate.
(e.g. "Currently I have to ... every time I want to ...")

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you have in mind. Include command names, flags, or
interaction flows if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have thought of.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else that
would help evaluate the request.
